---
id: remove-custom-metadata
title: "Remove custom metadata"
description: "Removes all custom metadata for the specified metadata group from a document."
sidebar_label: "Remove custom metadata"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: api/indexing-api/glean-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Remove custom metadata"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/rest/api/index/document/{docId}/custom-metadata/{groupName}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes all custom metadata for the specified metadata group from a document.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
